name: ci-reader
description: Read-only CI status + log streaming across GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, CircleCI, Jenkins, Buildkite, Drone/Woodpecker, Tekton, ArgoCD/FluxCD. Weaver reads; Assembler runs. Normalizes per-system check payloads into a typed Check interface and emits weaver.ci.status.observed events. GitHub Actions fully implemented via gh CLI; 7 other systems stub and degrade to manual-handoff.
